claims.summary: A 12D glimpse must remain metadata-rich companion/distillation, not a replacement for the 32D/48D semantic source-of-truth lane.
claims.rationale: Existing codec readouts label 12D as companion summary, preserve 32D residual context, and assert live_vector_write=false.

claims.summary: Restart/checkpoint use of 12D needs fidelity and resonance-loss monitoring so distinguishability loss and tail vibrancy do not silently collapse.
claims.rationale: Existing multi_scale_observer_v1 measures fidelity, resolution delta, resonance loss, anchor continuity, and Experience Delta Bus fallback-to-live-transport review.

claims.summary: Using 12D as live transport, reconstruction authority, or control input would be a broader live architecture/protocol change.
claims.rationale: That would alter live semantic transport/checkpoint authority rather than report truth-channel metadata.
